mapper.select: select g_idx, g_writer, g_subject, g_email, g_content, g_regdate, g_active, f_name from guestbook where g_active = 0 order by g_idx asc
mapper.insert: insert into guestbook(g_idx, g_writer, g_subject, g_content, g_email, g_pwd, g_regdate) values(seq_guestbook.nextval, #{g_writer}, #{g_subject}, #{g_content}, #{g_email}, #{g_pwd}, sysdate)
mapper.select: select * from guestbook where g_idx = #{g_idx} and g_active = 0
